# @architecture/validate-openapi-drift

Validates OpenAPI documentation drift for platform-api routes.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @architecture/validate-openapi-drift
Version: 0.1.0
Component: validate-openapi-drift
Type: tool
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: architecture
Bounded context: architecture-governance
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: stable
Role: tooling
Class: stable.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: on-change
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Compare platform-api route definitions with docs/api/openapi.json
- Report missing or extra path-method combinations
- Emit evidence for ADR-ACT-0139

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not generate OpenAPI from source
- Does not approve new REST routes

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- node tools/architecture/validate-openapi-drift/src/index.mjs .

## Operational notes

- Run npm run openapi:drift from the repository root to validate routes against docs/api/openapi.json.
- The validation is enforced through the architecture test suite, so drift fails the normal workspace checks.

## Governance

```text
Decision refs:
ADR-0011
ADR-0013
```
